content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(1, 9, 0), (0, 5, 3), (0, 9, 3), (2, 6, 3), (5, 8, 3), (2, 9, 10), (0, 7, 13), (2, 7, 15), (0, 6, 17), (0, 4, 20), (2, 5, 20), (4, 7, 22), (4, 5, 23), (4, 6, 23), (3, 6, 24), (4, 8, 25), (0, 8, 27)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 7 exactly at time 22.

We scan each edge (u, v, t) and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node.

For time 22:

* Edge (2, 9, 10) has node 2 and time 10. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (0, 7, 13) has node 0 and time 13. -> Add node 7.

The nodes matched at time 22 are 9 and 7.

Answer: [9, 7]
